nodes.name: test_html_to_gitlab_md.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for the HTML to GitLab-Markdown converter, covering stats counting, pandoc resolution, content-root selection, spec conformance for Confluence constructs, and the convert CLI command.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pytest classes as grouping containers (TestStats, TestSpecConformance, etc.) over the convert subpackage.

nodes.name: test_ast_parser.py
nodes.summary: Tests the pandoc AST wrapper: version probing, single-file AST generation with required keys, and batch generation including JSON output writing.

nodes.name: test_chunk_gate.py
nodes.summary: Tests the binding chunk hygiene gate (quality.check_chunk), validating that poisoned markup-residue chunks are flagged while clean and code chunks pass.

nodes.name: test_chunking.py
nodes.summary: Tests the deterministic chunking stage: text splitting, chunk_document metadata inheritance, entity scoping, merge-definitions/merge-prose modes, embed budget, and junk filtering.

nodes.name: test_cli_workspace.py
nodes.summary: Tests the CLI workspace zone guards, ensuring index/lint reject out-of-zone input/output paths and that defaults land in the configured inbox/outbox zones.

nodes.name: test_cli.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end tests for the export, scan, and lint CLI commands, covering format validation, vocabulary persistence, merge-definitions colocation, and lint exit codes.

nodes.name: test_config.py
nodes.summary: Tests PipelineConfig loading: workspace defaults and env overrides, entity-terms JSON parsing, embed/merge defaults, and vector-store backend selection.

nodes.name: test_corpus_taxonomy.py
nodes.summary: Tests the corpus taxonomy module that classifies and aggregates document taxonomy across the corpus.

nodes.name: test_direction.py
nodes.summary: Tests the direction module: loading field directions and resolving the direction for a given field.

nodes.name: test_doc_router.py
nodes.summary: Tests the document router: detecting document type, loading taxonomy, and resolving the taxonomy applicable to a document.

nodes.name: test_e2e_real_docs.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end tests running the full SemanticPipeline against real documents, exercising the parse-through-search flow with actual fixtures.

nodes.name: test_embeddings.py
nodes.summary: Tests the embeddings layer: the Azure OpenAI embedder batching/ordering/error handling and the make_embedder factory dispatch between local and azure providers.

nodes.name: test_enrichment_inventory.py
nodes.summary: Tests enrichment inventory behavior, validating enrich_section produces expected entity records and section metadata.

nodes.name: test_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the enrichment stage: section-type classification, entity extraction, tag extraction, recursive section enrichment, and the cross-corpus scan_corpus discovery.

nodes.name: test_eval_retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the retrieval-eval scoring core in src/tools/scripts/eval_retrieval.py, loaded by path since the scripts dir is not on the import path.

nodes.name: test_extract_prose.py
nodes.summary: Tests the prose extraction module: build_prose_inventory and extract_prose over a DocumentModel.

nodes.name: test_extract_structural.py
nodes.summary: Tests the structural extraction module: build_structural_inventory and extract_structural over a DocumentModel section tree.

nodes.name: test_header_norm.py
nodes.summary: Tests the header normalization helper (normalise_header) that canonicalizes section heading text.

nodes.name: test_memory_vector_store.py
nodes.summary: Tests the in-memory vector store backend: roundtrip search, filters, corpus retrieval, delete/reset, persistence reload, protocol conformance, and the make_vector_store factory.

nodes.name: test_models.py
nodes.summary: Tests the pure dataclass models: ContentBlock, enums, DocumentModel section iteration, and the SemanticChunk embed-text/metadata/dict serialization contracts.

nodes.name: test_pipeline_inventory_e2e.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end tests verifying the pipeline produces the expected inventory output over a constructed DocumentModel.

nodes.name: test_pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Core tests for SemanticPipeline orchestration: stable doc ids, lazy embedder/store construction, process/index file and directory flows, cross-corpus scan, search delegation/provenance, and the chunk gate.

nodes.name: test_quality.py
nodes.summary: Tests the raw-markdown linter (quality.check_markdown), validating detection of embedding-harmful residue like leaked HTML, macros, code dumps, and near-empty stubs.

nodes.name: test_reconcile.py
nodes.summary: Tests the reconcile module that merges and deduplicates EntityRecord instances.

nodes.name: test_retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Tests the lexical retrieval primitives: tokenize, the BM25Index ranking, and reciprocal_rank_fusion used by hybrid search.
